comment: Manual model promotion controls. Positive scoreAdjustment boosts; negative scoreAdjustment lowers. sponsored=true should be shown with a clear public sponsored/featured label. hidden removes the model. suppressed pushes it down. brokenImage removes the source image from prominent placements until fixed.

skylarmaexo.label: Premium CPC
skylarmaexo.notes: Highest CPC partner and strong audience metric; pin to primary homepage hero slot.

lyracr0w0-vip.label: Reduce homepage frequency
lyracr0w0-vip.notes: Lowered because a source-score outlier was making this profile over-present on the homepage.

purelatex.label: Broken image review
purelatex.notes: Current source image URL returns 404. Keep out of prominent image slots until refreshed.

sabrina-fontana.label: Broken image review
sabrina-fontana.notes: Current source image URL returns 404. Keep out of prominent image slots until refreshed.
